title: Modern ReIndustrialization
description: Textures from StaTech Industry now for Modern Industrialization!
body:
This resourcepack ports the textures of the "**StaTech Industry**" modpack for "[**Modern Industrialization**](https://modrinth.com/mod/modern-industrialization/versions)"
# Before
![Before](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/382e88497d5de60351691532be8b96b4e0974716.png)
# After
![After](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/577d56269c083e2cbc7e739a46442851f7c51b19.png)
[ZedTech MI](https://github.com/Flyte-less/ZedTech-MI/) by [Flyte-less](https://github.com/Flyte-less)

[Modern Industrialization](https://modrinth.com/mod/modern-industrialization) by [Technici4n](https://modrinth.com/user/Technici4n)

Special thanks for original Zedderian Technologies textures to [Zerrens](https://forum.industrial-craft.net/core/user/12229-vexxel/)
